meaning: n.围裙,外表或作用类似围裙的东西,[机]挡板,护坦
examples: She wiped her floury hands on her apron.
What have you got in your apron?
He tugged at her apron and the hands.
When you've doffed your apron, take time to check out the palazzo's fabulous art collection.
With me were food writer Nevin Martell and Nate Anda, head butcher at Red Apron.
